description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a single-story layout and an open, airy design. The structure includes a main residential building with large windows, a spacious wooden deck, and a rectangular swimming pool at the center of the outdoor area. The property is landscaped with several palm trees and low shrubbery, creating a tropical ambiance. There is a covered outdoor lounge or barbecue area adjacent to the pool, and a long walkway connects the entrance to the main building and outdoor spaces. The color palette is primarily white and gray, with blue from the pool and green from the vegetation. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor transition.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a central pool, wooden deck, and tropical landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_0: Shows the main building, pool, deck, walkway, and landscaping with palm trees; the open layout and outdoor lounge are visible.
description_view_1: Highlights the pool and outdoor lounge area, with palm trees and the main building in the background.
description_view_2: Displays the side of the bungalow, emphasizing the flat roof, pool, and the arrangement of palm trees and deck.
description_view_3: Focuses on the rear and side of the main building, showing the pool, deck, and landscaping from a different angle.
